channel.title: StayFresh
channel.description: Static archive of workflow research and patterns for AI-assisted development.

item.title: StayFresh Thesis
item.description: The hard position behind the archive: reward surfaces, legible architecture, and tools that lower comprehension debt.

item.title: Anubis in Front of GitHub Pages
item.description: How to put Anubis in front of a GitHub Pages site with a real reverse proxy and no proxy-loop nonsense.

item.title: Instant Project Sync
item.description: Synchronize ticket queues against contract dates and repository evidence, with requirement reconstruction when docs are missing.

item.title: psay Agent Notifications
item.description: Local voice and Notification Center loops for agent completion, handoff, and operator recall.

item.title: Project AI Philosophy
item.description: A written position for bounded, evidence-backed AI use in delivery.

item.title: Preference TOML
item.description: Use RLHF-shaped semantics in a simple config DSL for agent evaluation loops.

item.title: Reward Rubric DSL
item.description: A small machine-readable format for scoring coding agent output.

item.title: Prompt Patterns
item.description: Common prompt structures for reliable agent behavior.

item.title: Agent Psychology
item.description: Understanding how agents reason and respond to instructions.

item.title: CI Automation with AI Agents
item.description: Integrating AI agents with continuous integration workflows.

item.title: Reward Engineering for Coding Agents
item.description: Why coding agents optimize the rubric more than the prompt.

item.title: Reward Hacking in Coding Agents
item.description: How poorly designed metrics produce plausible but unstable code.

item.title: AGENTS.md Effectiveness
item.description: Evaluating repository-level context files for coding agents.

item.title: Persona Anchors
item.description: Character-based instruction patterns for consistent agent behavior.
